_comment_schema: This line tells the system which rules this file follows
_comment_id: FORM IDENTIFICATION: A unique name for this form that the system uses internally
_comment_version: VERSION CONTROL: Helps track changes to this form over time (like 1.0.0, 1.1.0, 2.0.0)
_comment_name: DISPLAY NAME: The human-readable name shown to users
name: Get Birth Certificate
_comment_description: FORM PURPOSE: A brief explanation of what this form does
description: Apply for a copy of your birth certificate or someone else's birth certificate
_comment_metadata: ADMINISTRATIVE INFO: Who owns this form and when it was last changed
_comment_pages: FORM STRUCTURE: This form is broken into multiple pages (like a wizard). Each page is a step in the process.

pages._comment_page_1_desc: PAGE 1: Collect information about the person filling out the form
pages.title: Tell us about yourself
pages._comment_sections: SECTIONS: Each page can have multiple sections. Sections group related fields together.

sections._comment_section_1_pattern: This section REUSES a pre-built pattern instead of defining fields from scratch
sections._comment_section_1_benefit: BENEFIT: The 'personal-details-barbados' pattern is used across 10+ forms. Define once, use everywhere!
sections._comment_section_1_namespace: NAMESPACE: Adds 'applicant.' prefix to all fields (e.g., applicant.firstName, applicant.lastName)
sections._comment_section_1_why_namespace: WHY? So we can use the same pattern multiple times without field name conflicts
sections._comment_overrides: CUSTOMIZATION: We can override the pattern's defaults for this specific form
sections._comment_overrides_example: Here we're making the validation stricter than the pattern's default

sections._comment_section_2_pattern: REUSING another pattern - the Barbados address pattern
sections._comment_section_2_benefit: This pattern includes parish selection and postal code validation specific to Barbados

sections._comment_section_3_desc: SECTION 3: ID Number with alternative passport option
sections._comment_section_3_unique: UNIQUE FIELDS: These fields are specific to this form, not from a pattern
sections._comment_section_3_why: WHY? Because this ID/passport logic is unique to certificate applications

fields._comment_field_id: Standard text input for National ID Number
fields.name: applicant.idNumber
fields.label: National Identification (ID) Number

fields._comment_field_showhide: SHOW/HIDE FIELD: An expandable section that reveals more fields when clicked
fields._comment_field_showhide_use: USE CASE: Provides an alternative option without cluttering the main form
fields.name: applicant.passportDetails

showHide.description: If you don't have a National ID number, you can use your passport number instead.

fields._comment_nested_field: This field only appears when the user clicks 'Use passport number instead'
fields.name: applicant.passportNumber
fields.label: Passport Number

sections._comment_section_4_pattern: REUSING the contact details pattern with Barbados phone validation

pages._comment_page_2_desc: PAGE 2: Ask if they're applying for themselves or someone else
pages._comment_page_2_importance: CRITICAL QUESTION: The answer determines which pages show next
pages.title: Are you applying for your own birth certificate?

fields._comment_radio: RADIO BUTTON: User must choose one option
fields._comment_radio_impact: This answer controls which pages appear next (conditional logic)
fields.name: applyingForYourself
fields.label: Are you applying for your own birth certificate?

options.label: Yes - the certificate is for me
No - the certificate is for someone else

pages._comment_page_3_conditional: CONDITIONAL LOGIC: This page ONLY shows if they answered 'no' on page 2
pages._comment_page_3_why: WHY? If applying for yourself, we don't need to know your relationship to yourself!
pages.title: What is your relationship to the person?
pages._comment_conditional: SHOW/HIDE RULE: Only show this page if applyingForYourself = 'no'

fields._comment_select: DROPDOWN: User selects from predefined options
fields.name: relationshipToPerson
fields.label: What is your relationship to the person?

fields._comment_nested_conditional: NESTED CONDITIONAL: This field only shows if they selected 'other' above
fields._comment_nested_why: WHY? We only need a description if they chose 'Other'
fields.name: relationshipOtherDescription
fields.label: Please describe your relationship
fields.helpText: For example, nephew, researcher, historian, or authorised representative.

pages._comment_page_4_desc: PAGE 4: Ask why they need the certificate (CONDITIONAL)
pages.title: Tell us why you're ordering a birth certificate

fields._comment_textarea: TEXTAREA: Multi-line text input for longer responses
fields.name: reasonForOrderingCertificate
fields.label: Reason

pages._comment_page_5_desc: PAGE 5: Ask if person is deceased (CONDITIONAL)
pages.title: Is the person deceased?

fields._comment_date_conditional: DATE FIELD: Only shows if they answered 'yes' above
fields._comment_date_validation: DATE VALIDATION: Must be in the past (can't die in the future!)
fields.name: dateOfDeath
fields.label: Date of death

pages._comment_page_6_desc: PAGE 6: Details about the other person (CONDITIONAL)
pages._comment_page_6_pattern_reuse: PATTERN REUSE: Using 'person-name-simple' pattern with 'person' namespace
pages.title: Tell us about the person you are applying for

sections._comment_pattern_reuse_example: REUSING PATTERN: Same name fields, different namespace (person.firstName vs applicant.firstName)

fields.name: person.hasNisNumber
fields.label: Do they have a National Insurance (NIS) number?

fields._comment_nis_conditional: Conditional field: Only shows if they have a NIS number
fields.name: person.nisNumber
fields.label: National Insurance (NIS) Number
fields.helpText: Enter a valid NIS number (6 digits)

pages._comment_page_7_desc: PAGE 7: Birth details for self (CONDITIONAL - only if applying for yourself)
pages.title: Provide your birth details

fields._comment_date_past: DATE FIELD: Birth date must be in the past
fields.name: birthDetails.dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth

fields.name: birthDetails.placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.helpText: Enter a house, institution, home address, or parish, if known

fields.name: birthDetails.placeOfBaptism
fields.label: Place of baptism
fields.helpText: Enter a house, church, or parish, if known

pages._comment_page_8_pattern: PATTERN REUSE: Using parent-information pattern with 'parents' namespace
pages._comment_page_8_benefit: This same pattern is used in birth registration, marriage cert, etc.
pages.title: Tell us your parents' names

pages._comment_page_9_desc: PAGE 9: Parent names for other person (CONDITIONAL)
pages._comment_page_9_pattern_reuse: SAME PATTERN, DIFFERENT NAMESPACE: 'parentsOther' instead of 'parents'
pages._comment_page_9_why: WHY? Avoids field name conflicts. Creates parentsOther.father.firstName vs parents.father.firstName
pages.title: Tell us their parents' names
How many copies will you be ordering?

fields._comment_number: NUMBER FIELD: Numeric input with min/max validation
fields.name: order.numberOfCopies
fields.label: Number of copies

pages._comment_page_11_desc: PAGE 11: Review page (no fields, just shows summary)
pages.title: Check your answers

fields._comment_checkbox: CHECKBOX: Must be checked to proceed (required validation)
fields.name: declaration.confirmed
fields.label: I confirm that my information is correct and I am happy for it to be verified. I understand that false details may lead to my application being rejected, and that the Government of Barbados will keep my information confidential.

validation.required: You must confirm the declaration to continue

fields._comment_date_today: DATE FIELD: Declaration date (must be today or earlier)
fields.name: declaration.dateOfDeclaration
fields.label: Date of declaration

pages.title: Your submission has been saved
pages.description: Complete your payment below to finalize your submission
pages.bodyContent:
## What happens next

You will receive a confirmation email with:

- Your application reference number
- the cost of the certificate(s)
- the expected completion date

_comment_processors_desc: PROCESSORS: Actions that happen after the form is submitted

processors._comment_payment: PAYMENT PROCESSOR: Integrates with EZPay payment system
processors._comment_payment_dynamic: DYNAMIC PRICING: Amount = numberOfCopies × price per copy

processors._comment_email_admin: EMAIL PROCESSOR 1: Sends notification to admin staff
processors._comment_email_admin_template: Uses pre-built email template with form data

processors._comment_email_user: EMAIL PROCESSOR 2: Sends confirmation to the applicant
processors._comment_email_user_purpose: Provides receipt and reference number to user
